scripts.dev:local: npm run dev --workspace backend & npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.start:backend: npx prisma db push --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && npm start --workspace backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
